SELECT arrayEmptyToSingle(arr, default_val) AS result FROM test_arrays, default_values WHERE arr = [];
SELECT arrayEmptyToSingle(arr, 100) AS result FROM (SELECT [] AS arr) AS subquery;
WITH [] AS empty_arr, 3 AS default_val SELECT arrayEmptyToSingle(empty_arr, default_val) AS result;
CREATE TABLE example_table (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayEmptyToSingle(values, 0) AS processed FROM example_table;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayEmptyToSingle(arrayJoin([[]]), 1) AS single_value FROM another_table;
WITH (SELECT [] AS empty_arr), (SELECT 7 AS def_value) SELECT arrayEmptyToSingle(empty_arr, def_value) AS result;
